## Description

Brief description of the changes made in this PR.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Protocol change (requires spec update)

## Related Issues

Fixes # (issue)
Related to # (issue)

## Protocol Impact

- [ ] No protocol changes
- [ ] Protocol changes (update `docs/SPEC.md` and version bump required)

If protocol changes are included, describe them and reference the updated spec sections.

## Conformance Testing

- [ ] Ran `just conformance` and all implementations pass
- [ ] Regenerated test vectors if protocol changed
- [ ] No conformance impact

## Testing

- [ ] Added tests for new functionality
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] Added examples for new features

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] Ran `just fmt` to format code
- [ ] Ran `just lint` to check for linting issues
- [ ] Self-reviewed the code
- [ ] Commented complex code sections
- [ ] Updated documentation if needed
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md if user-visible changes
- [ ] No new warnings generated

## Additional Notes

Any additional context or notes for reviewers.
